title: genista pendulina
intro: Genista pendulina, also known as hanging broom or broom spurge, is a flowering plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Genista pendulina can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and expectorant properties.
